Mariano José María Bernardo Fortuny y Carbó

1 work in the gallery.

Costume of the Time of Goya
by Mariano José María Bernardo Fortuny y Carbó
Spain · 1858–1874 · Etching on paper
←Possibly after Polidoro Caldara, called Polidoro da Caravaggio Etienne Carjat→
